description: Nested inline PERFORM VARYING: outer I 1-3, inner J 1-2. IBM expects 6 iterations.
notes: IBM gap: Nested inline PERFORM VARYING should produce 3*2=6 iterations. Engine only executes the body once (WS-COUNT=1), likely because nested inline PERFORM VARYING is not fully supported for inline bodies. Use PERFORM VARYING...AFTER (perform_varying_after test) for correct nested loop behavior. IBM expected WS-COUNT=6.
